name: quilt-sync
description: Cross-platform desktop application for editing Quilt data packages

scripts.build: npm run frontend:build && npm run tauri:build
scripts.build:deb: npm run frontend:build && npm run tauri:build -- --bundles deb
scripts.frontend:build: parcel build && cd ui && trunk build
scripts.frontend:lint: npm run frontend:lint:ts && npm run frontend:lint:css
scripts.frontend:start: concurrently "parcel watch --no-hmr --target default" "cd ui && trunk watch"
scripts.test: npm run frontend:check && npm run frontend:lint && npm run tauri:test
